description:
DEGgo is an R package designed to simplify and standardize bulk RNA-seq differential expression analysis, from raw count matrices to biological interpretation.

Key features:
 • Automated QC and sample validation
 • Differential expression analysis (DESeq2, edgeR, limma)
 • Single and pairwise comparison workflows
 • Gene Ontology enrichment analysis
 • Publication-ready visualizations
 • Comprehensive reporting and result export

Built to make transcriptomic analyses more reproducible, efficient, and user-friendly for researchers.
name: DEGgo
